business.headline: Sensex, Nifty bounced back in April. What can investors expect in May?After a broad-based April rally, can markets sustain momentum in May as earnings take centre stage, separating fundamentally strong companies from momentum-driven stocks while global risks continue to cap sharp upside?

Sensex, Nifty slip at open as oil spike and weak rupee unsettle marketsThe BSE Sensex was down 170.40 points, or 0.22%, at 77,099.00 at 9:35 am, while the Nifty 50 fell 65.85 points, or 0.27%, to 24,053.45 as of 9:35 am.

Why Warren Buffett says he doesn't understand today's markets any moreAce investor and former CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, Warren Buffett, said today's market is harder to read, with trading increasingly driven by short-term bets.

Sensex, Nifty today: Will market fall amid weak rupee, elevated oil prices?Markets are headed for a cautious start as weak global cues, elevated oil prices and a soft rupee weigh on sentiment. Election results and quarterly earnings may still shape intraday moves across stocks.

OnEMI Tech IPO far from fully booked; brokerage flags key risksOnEMI Technology Solutions' IPO remained underbooked on the second day, with weak retail and NII demand. The muted grey market premium and brokerage warnings have kept the issue in a cautious zone.
NSE introduces electronic gold receipts to digitise gold tradingEach EGR is backed by real gold, ensuring that investors still own physical value, just without the need to store it themselves.

Govt shields fuel buyers, rules out relief for oil PSUs amid crude spike: ReportThe government has ruled out compensating state-run fuel retailers while keeping retail petrol, diesel and LPG prices steady. The move shifts part of the cost to bulk and industrial users as inflation concerns stay in focus.

FIFA World Cup 2026 faces broadcast uncertainty in India, ChinaIn India, a Reliance-Disney joint venture has offered $20 million for 2026 World Cup broadcast rights, a fraction of FIFA's ask, which was not acceptable to soccer's global governing body, two sources told Reuters on Monday.

Sensex, Nifty rise on election boost, gains capped by weak rupeeMarkets closed higher on Monday after early gains drew support from state election trends and earnings optimism. The rally lost steam later as a weak rupee, firmer crude and profit booking kept investors cautious.

Are rising fuel costs and global risks reshaping the aviation sector?With fuel costs climbing and geopolitical risks increasing, the aviation sector is feeling the strain, but is this a short-term phase or a lasting shift?

Your mobile number is key to your finances. Here's the upside and riskIn India, the mobile number is becoming the key identifier across banking, payments, loans and insurance. That convenience is widening access, but it is also sharpening concerns around fraud, privacy and control.

Explained: Why BHEL share price jumped 10% to hit upper circuit todayBHEL stock: BHEL shares hit the 10% upper circuit after the company reported a sharp March quarter earnings beat. The rally was driven by stronger profit, better margins, solid revenue growth and a dividend recommendation.

8th Pay Commission update: Where things stand after 6 monthsSix months since its formation, the 8th Pay Commission is showing signs of progress, but key recommendations, timelines and clarity on pay revisions for central government employees are still awaited.

Sensex, Nifty get thumbs up as BJP leads in Bengal, markets gainThe BSE Sensex was up 334.71 points, or 0.44%, at 77,248.21 as of 12:44 pm, while the Nifty 50 gained 103.90 points, or 0.43%, to trade at 24,101.45 as of 12:30 PM.

Are election results behind today's fall in gold prices?Gold prices slipped on Monday, and one big question is on everyone's mind, i.e., are election results the reason behind the dip, or is there more at play in the market?

Why India's smaller cities are the next premium real estate goldmineTier II and III cities are emerging as the next hub for premium real estate growth, driven by infrastructure spending and stronger connectivity. The shift points to a long-term move towards high-value housing beyond metros as incomes and aspirations rise.

How this woman built a Rs 1 crore net worth by 28 before her weddingJust days before stepping into a new phase of life, a 28-year-old woman hit a goal many spend decades chasing—a Rs 1 crore net worth. And she did it without complex strategies or expert help.

Sensex jumps 700 points: Why is stock market rising today?The BSE Sensex jumped 896.70 points, or 1.17%, to 77,810.20 as of 9:50 am, while the Nifty 50 rose 262.70 points, or 1.09%, to 24,260.25 as of 9:50 am.
Sensex, Nifty jump over easing crude oil prices; Maruti leads gainsThe S&P BSE Sensex was up 778.78 points to 77,692.28, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 223.80 points to 24,221.35 as of 9:35 am.

OnEMI Technology IPO Day 2: Check latest subscription, GMP, listing detailsThe public issue was subscribed 0.63 times by the end of Day 2. While retail participation remained modest at 0.17 times, demand from qualified institutional buyers (QIBs) stood strong at 1.51 times, indicating confidence from large investors. The non-institutional investor (NII) segment was subscribed 0.53 times.

entertainment.headline: Malayalam actor Santhosh Nair dies in road accident, wife injured Malayalam actor Santhosh Nair died after a road accident at Enathu in Kerala's Pathanamthitta and a heart attack during treatment. He was last in Mohiniyattam, which received rave reviews.

Ektaa Kapoor reacts after Naagin 7 blue screen goof-up gets trolled Ektaa Kapoor reacted after Naagin 7 faced criticism over an apparent blue screen editing error. The viral moment revived discussion around the show's VFX, editing and earlier AI backlash.

Met Gala 2026 bizarre rules: No onion, no phones, no sitting with spouse As the Met Gala gets under way, attention has shifted to its unusual rules on food, phones and seating. The rulebook underlines how tightly the fundraiser controls the guest experience, from entry to etiquette.

After a decade, Beyonce makes a stunning Met Gala return in diamond skeleton look Beyonce returned to the Met Gala after 10 years, attending with Jay-Z and Blue Ivy. Her comeback as co-chair turned the family appearance into one of the night's biggest moments.

Double celebrations: Lakshmi Manchu calls Vijay's victory Trisha's birthday gift Lakshmi Manchu wished Trisha Krishnan on her birthday and tied the occasion to Vijay's big TVK win in Tamil Nadu. The post renewed chatter around Vijay and Trisha even as his divorce case kept his personal life under scrutiny.

Karan Johar's love letter to Indian art, legacy and friendship after Met Gala debut Karan Johar said his Met Gala debut was a deeply personal moment shaped by Raja Ravi Varma's legacy. In a post on social media, the filmmaker said the appearance placed Indian art, culture and storytelling before a global audience.

Raja Shivaji box office Day 1: Riteish's film beats Natsamrat as No. 2 Marathi film Raja Shivaji has become the second highest-grossing Marathi film in India within four days of release. Its strong run has taken it close to Rs 50 crore and within sight of Sairat's benchmark.

Cinema to power: Sandeep Reddy Vanga salutes Vijay's massive TVK win Sandeep Reddy Vanga congratulated Vijay after TVK emerged as the single largest party in its Assembly election debut. He shared a detailed post on X, celebrating cinema.

How Vijay secured mass connect in 2 years that took MGR 3 decades back in the day Vijay's TVK won 108 seats in its first Tamil Nadu Assembly election, drawing immediate comparisons with MGR's rise. The result highlighted the force of a digitally driven campaign, but his decisive test now shifts to government formation and governance.

KJo wants a selfie with Sabrina Carpenter at Met Gala: My daughter is obsessed Ahead of his first Met Gala appearance, Karan Johar said he hoped to meet Sabrina Carpenter and take a selfie for his daughter Roohi. The filmmaker revealed that his daughter is obsessed with the singer.

Blake Lively settles Justin Baldoni lawsuit pre-trial, attends Met Gala soon after Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni have settled their legal dispute that started after they worked together in It Ends With Us, weeks before trial. Within hours of the settlement, Lively made an appearance at the Met Gala 2026.

Karan Johar's style at debut Met Gala is a tribute to Raja Ravi Varma's iconic art Karan Johar made his Met Gala debut in New York wearing a Manish Malhotra ensemble inspired by Raja Ravi Varma. The hand-painted look turned his first appearance into a personal tribute to Indian art and identity.

Jana Nayagan producer reacts to Vijay's election win; fans demand CM title card Jana Nayagan producer Venkat K Narayana congratulated Vijay after the latter's political party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam surged past 100 seats in Tamil Nadu. Narayana shared a statement on Vijay's performance in the election.

Prakash Raj on Vijay's election victory: Society is fan-dominated, not political Prakash Raj reacted to Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam leading the Tamil Nadu election results. While congratulating the winners, he raised concerns about fan-driven politics.

The Devil Wears Prada 3: Cast reveals two conditions for a possible third film Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway and Emily Blunt opened up on the possibility of a third The Devil Wears Prada film and also reflected on the core cast returning.

Vicky Kaushal in Aamir Khan's 3 Idiots sequel as fourth 'idiot'? What we know Vicky Kaushal is reportedly in talks to join Aamir Khan's 3 Idiots sequel as a fourth "idiot," adding a fresh twist to the beloved franchise. Read on to know more.

Chiranjeevi, Suriya congratulate Vijay as TVK nears victory in Tamil Nadu Actor-turned-politician Vijay received congratulatory messages from Chiranjeevi, Mahesh Babu, Suriya and others as TVK secured a majority in the Tamil Nadu assembly elections.

Hugh Jackman ready to take blame for divorce, seeks peace with ex-wife Deborra Actor Hugh Jackman is reportedly trying to make peace with ex-wife Deborra-Lee Furness by accepting blame for their marriage breakdown. His effort comes before his daughter Ava's 21st birthday, as the actor hopes the family can celebrate the occasion together.

Trisha Krishnan gets special birthday poster from Karuppu team ahead of release Makers of her upcoming film, Karuppu, unveiled a special birthday poster for actor Trisha Krishnan on May 4, offering a vibrant glimpse of her character, Preethi.

general news.headline: Goons entered, beat me up: Mamata's explosive phone call on Bhabanipur lossTMC MP Kalyan Banerjee shared a phone call in which Mamata Banerjee alleged irregularities during Bhabanipur counting, claiming intimidation at counting centres and removal of her agents. She further accused procedural lapses in handling EVMs and said the outcome would be legally challenged with supporting evidence.

From house help to MLA: BJP's Kalita Majhi wins seat as saffron wave sweeps BengalKalita Majhi, a domestic worker from Guskara, won the Ausgram seat as the BJP swept West Bengal. Her victory underscored the party's push for grassroots candidates amid a wider political shift in the state.

Did fear and force projection influence Bengal election results?Bengal's 2026 election unfolded under an unprecedented central security deployment after years of poll violence. The heavy presence of forces reshaped voter confidence and became a key factor in the BJP's historic victory.

8th Pay Commission update: Where things stand after 6 monthsSix months since its formation, the 8th Pay Commission is showing signs of progress, but key recommendations, timelines and clarity on pay revisions for central government employees are still awaited.

Vijay landslide: TN hasn't abandoned its grammar. It has changed the lead characterThere is admiration in the verdict, but there is also a warning embedded in it. A democracy that seeks a messiah might find the energy, but it must still demand method. A face can win a mandate; only institutions can sustain it. Therein lies Vijay's next big challenge.

Live: 'Will play role of strong Opposition,' says Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin on poll lossAssembly Election Result Live Updates: The 2026 Assembly results are redrawing India's political map, with the BJP poised to form its first government in West Bengal after crossing the 200-mark in a 294-seat House, while retaining Assam for a third straight term. In Bengal, counting is in its final leg, with the Trinamool Congress leading in the lone remaining seat — Rajarhat New Town — where one more round is pending. The state voted in two phases on April 23 and 29, recording a turnout of over 92 per cent. The Election Commission has also ordered a repoll in Falta on May 21, citing "severe electoral offences," with results to follow separately. Beyond Bengal, the national picture is crystallising — most notably in Tamil Nadu, where actor-politician Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) is set to form the government in its debut outing, signalling a major political shift. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for all the latest updates.

Vijay's TVK, short of majority, seeks Governor's appointment for govt formationVijay's TVK emerged as the single largest party in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections with 108 seats, but fell short of a majority. The party has sought time for an appointment with the Governor over government formation.

3 parties, 3 seats: Lottery King Santiago Martin's family wins big in TN, PuducherryAadhav Arjuna, Leema Rose Martin, and Jose Charles Martin, the son-in-law, wife, and son of Santiago Martin, respectively, have won the election in Tamil Nadu and Puducherry.

Isha Ambani takes a gold saree, gajra and 'aam' to the Met Gala 2026Isha Ambani once again showed how to do Met Gala right. This time, she brought Indian fashion and art to the fashion world's biggest night.

Anthropic, OpenAI launch AI services companies, challenge TCS and Infosys in IndiaAnthropic has announced a new $1.5 billion joint venture with major Wall Street firms including Blackstone and Goldman Sachs. According to the AI startup, the new joint venture will be an AI services company that will sell its tools to companies.

Godrej Industries lays out 2031 growth ambitionsThe purpose statement, 'Crafting tomorrow since 1897', celebrates the Godrej Group's legacy while clearly positioning the new, refreshed Godrej Industries for the future.

In Bengal elections, 'Jai Shri Ram' faded on stage but not on streetsAs the BJP shifted from "Jai Shri Ram" to "Joy Ma Kali" in Bengal, the older chant continued to surface among the masses at public events. The contrast highlighted how political messaging evolved, while the slogan itself retained a life of its own.

Crocodile tracked by drone, cut open; man's remains, 6 pairs of shoes found insideRescuers in South Africa airlifted a giant crocodile after Gabriel Batista disappeared in floodwaters. The dissection found body parts of a man, widening the investigation.
Is the use of generative AI lowering your confidence?Participants who relied more on GenAI tools reported a lower confidence in their own reasoning, a study has found.

Unacceptable: India condemns Iran's attack on Fujairah that injured 3 IndiansIndia condemned Iran's attack on the Fujairah Petroleum Industries Zone in the UAE, which injured three Indian nationals, calling it "unacceptable" and urging an immediate halt to hostilities and the targeting of civilian infrastructure.

Met Gala 2026 bizarre rules: No onion, no phones, no sitting with spouseAs the Met Gala gets under way, attention has shifted to its unusual rules on food, phones and seating. The rulebook underlines how tightly the fundraiser controls the guest experience, from entry to etiquette.

The shehnai of India's birth is silent, and physics can't ignore itThe shehnai's hauntingly beautiful melody filled the Red Fort on India's Independence Day without a single microphone, because its physics makes it one of the most powerful acoustic instruments ever built.

Asansol Durga temple, shut for several years, reopens after BJP's huge Bengal winA Durga temple in West Bengal's Asansol reopened to devotees after remaining shut for several years due to local tensions. The move followed the BJP's sweep in Paschim Bardhaman district and in the Assembly polls.

FIFA rejects Reliance-Disney $20M bid for 2026 World Cup India rightsFIFA has rejected Reliance-Disney's $20 million bid for India's 2026 World Cup broadcast rights package. With time shrinking, millions of fans could miss the tournament unless broadcasters strike terms quickly.

How Vijay secured mass connect in 2 years that took MGR 3 decades back in the dayVijay's TVK won 108 seats in its first Tamil Nadu Assembly election, drawing immediate comparisons with MGR's rise. The result highlighted the force of a digitally driven campaign, but his decisive test now shifts to government formation and governance.

Karan Johar's love letter to Indian art, legacy and friendship after Met Gala debutKaran Johar said his Met Gala debut was a deeply personal moment shaped by Raja Ravi Varma's legacy. In a post on social media, the filmmaker said the appearance placed Indian art, culture and storytelling before a global audience.

Meet Palantir, world's most dangerous company you have probably never heard ofPalantir has published a 22-point manifesto, trying to tell the world on how human affairs must be conducted. But what is Palantir and why has the manifesto sparked a debate?

Man flies from Muscat to vote for TVK, single ballot unseats DMK ministerOne voter travelled from Muscat to cast her vote for TVK in Tiruppattur, where DMK minister KR Periyakaruppan lost by a single vote as the party surged.

Why Mamata lost her safe seat Bhabanipur to BJP's Suvendu AdhikariBJP leader Suvendu Adhikari defeated Mamata Banerjee in Bhabanipur, the safe seat that sent the Trinamool Congress chief to the Assembly as the chief minister. The loss adds insult to injury even as the BJP decimated the TMC in the West Bengal Assembly election. These are the factors behind Mamata's loss in Bhabanipur.

Malayalam actor Santhosh Nair dies in road accident, wife injuredMalayalam actor Santhosh Nair died after a road accident at Enathu in Kerala's Pathanamthitta and a heart attack during treatment. He was last in Mohiniyattam, which received rave reviews.

Met Gala 2026 bizarre rules: No onion, no phones, no sitting with spouseAs the Met Gala gets under way, attention has shifted to its unusual rules on food, phones and seating. The rulebook underlines how tightly the fundraiser controls the guest experience, from entry to etiquette.

sports.headline: When will Hardik Pandya return from injury for MI in IPL 2026? IPL 2026: Hardik Pandya missed Mumbai Indians' match against Lucknow Super Giants with a back spasm. His uncertain return leaves MI monitoring their captain closely during a crucial stage of IPL 2026.

Neymar accused of assault on Santos teammate after heated training clash IPL 2026: Santos are investigating an alleged training-ground altercation between Neymar and Robinho Jr. The episode has raised player-safety concerns and put the youngster's future at the club in focus.

Rishabh Pant's Rs 27 crore price tag under scrutiny? Langer defends LSG captain IPL 2026: Justin Langer defended Rishabh Pant's form and tactical calls after Lucknow Super Giants lost to Mumbai Indians. The support came as Pant's modest returns and LSG's inability to sustain strong positions stayed under focus.

No T20 talk or life-changing advice: How Rohit formulated Rickelton's MI rise Ryan Rickleton said his discussions with Rohit Sharma are focused on batting, not only T20 cricket. He said Rohit's calm, clarity, and chemistry at the top are helping the Mumbai Indians stay alive in the playoff race.

Buoyed by Starc's return, DC aim to crush CSK as playoffs race intensifies IPL 2026: Mid-table dwellers Delhi Capitals and Chennai Super Kings face off at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi. It is expected that Delhi will unleash their fierce pace attack on CSK, one that is bolstered by the return of Lungi Ngidi.

Premier League title race out of City's hands after Everton draw: Guardiola Pep Guardiola said Manchester City's 3-3 draw with Everton left the title race out of their hands as he conceded that the advantage is now with Arsenal.

IPL Play Of The Day: Rohit-Rickelton turn into MI's Batman-Robin to down LSG IPL 2026: Rohit Sharma made his Batman-esque return with 84, adding an opening stand of 143 with Ryan Rickelton as Mumbai Indians chased 229 against Lucknow Super Giants. The win lifted MI to six points and kept their slim playoff chances alive.

Paisa vasool: How Rohit Sharma vowed fans with stunning comeback vs LSG IPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Harbhajan Singh said fans got full value for money as Rohit Sharma's 84 off 44 powered Mumbai Indians to a thrilling chase of 229 against Lucknow Super Giants at the Wankhede Stadium.

Helpless Rishabh Pant left praying for luck as LSG sink deeper after MI defeat IPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Rishabh Pant cut a helpless figure after the Lucknow Super Giants suffered their sixth straight defeat, going down to the Mumbai Indians by six wickets on Monday at the Wankhede Stadium.

Rohit Sharma roars back to keep Mumbai Indians alive in playoffs race IPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Rohit Sharma scored 84 off 44 balls as Suryakumar Yadav's Mumbai Indians beat Rishabh Pant's Lucknow Super Giants by six wickets on Monday, keeping their playoff hopes alive.

FIFA rejects Reliance-Disney $20M bid for 2026 World Cup India rights FIFA has rejected Reliance-Disney's $20 million bid for India's 2026 World Cup broadcast rights package. With time shrinking, millions of fans could miss the tournament unless broadcasters strike terms quickly.

MI's Raghu Sharma celebrates maiden IPL wicket with Jai Shri Ram note: WatchIPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Raghu Sharma marked his maiden IPL wicket with an emotional note after dismissing Akshat Raghuwanshi. The leg-spinner also impressed with figures of 4-0-36-1, underlining his steady rise from domestic grind to the Mumbai Indians setup.

IPL: Delhi prepare to unleash hell on CSK as Lungi Ngidi returnsLungi Ngidi is available for Delhi Capitals' home match against Chennai Super Kings after completing the mandatory break. His return could allow Delhi to field him with Mitchell Starc in a key contest between two sides level on points.

'BJP agent Messi': Fans have field-day after party sweeps Bengal electionsThe BJP swept the Bengal elections marking the end of the 15-year-rule of the TMC. Amidst the frenzy, the sports fans wondered, was this loss triggered by Lionel Messi's visit to Kolkata?

Nicholas Pooran shakes off KKR horror, decimates Mumbai Indians with 16-ball fiftyIPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Nicholas Pooran silenced critics with a blistering 16-ball fifty, smashing 63 off 21 balls to power LSG after a poor run of form. He tore into MI's bowlers with fearless hitting before Corbin Bosch ended his stunning knock.

Who is Akshat Raghuwanshi? MP batter makes IPL debut against idol Rohit SharmaIPL 2026: Rishabh Pant confirmed Akshat Raghuwanshi's maiden IPL cap for Lucknow Super Giants against Mumbai Indians at Wankhede. The debut places a sought-after Madhya Pradesh batter on a bigger stage after strong domestic returns.

Vaishnavi Sharma stays grounded after T20 World Cup snub: Still a lot to learnVaishnavi Sharma has taken her T20 World Cup snub in stride, saying she has plenty to learn and a long career ahead. The youngster remains focused on self-improvement and growth, drawing confidence from her domestic success and early international exposure.

Rohit Sharma is back: Mumbai crowd roars for legend after Suryakumar's messageIPL 2026: The Wankhede crowd let out massive cheers as Rohit Sharma returned to the team's line-up on May 4. Stand-in captain Suryakumar Yadav announced major changes in MI's must-win game against Lucknow Super Giants.

Milan Rejoices as Inter secures 21st Scudetto with 2-0 win over ParmaInter beat Parma 2-0 to seal their 21st Scudetto and set off celebrations across Milan. The title completes a sharp recovery from last season's late collapse and keeps a domestic double in play.

Nandni Sharma trades lawyer, astronaut dreams for maiden India call-upNandni Sharma's childhood dreams of becoming a lawyer or astronaut gave way to cricket, a decision now paying off with a maiden India call-up after a standout season for Delhi Capitals in the Women's Premier League 2026.

Babar Azam's Zalmi try to recreate Rohit Sharma's celebration, fail hilariouslyPeshwar Zalmi beat Hyderabad Kingsmen to win the Pakistan Super League 2026. Zalmi captain Babar Azam tried to recreate Rohit Sharma's trophy celebration but ended up failing miserably.

Djokovic, Sinner, Sabalenka among stars disappointed over French Open prize moneyLeading players have challenged the French Open prize money offer before this month's tournament begins. The dispute centres on a falling revenue share and unresolved demands on representation, health support and pensions.

Will Rohit Sharma play MI vs LSG? Hitman's intense training session lifts hopesIPL 2026: Mumbai Indians are waiting on Rohit Sharma's fitness before facing Lucknow Super Giants at the Wankhede. His possible return comes as both sides fight to stay alive in the points table.

No MS Dhoni in CSK's next game after legend skips Delhi tripChennai Super Kings fans will have to wait longer for MS Dhoni in the Indian Premier League. The former CSK captain has not travelled with the team to Delhi to play the team's next game against Delhi Capitals.

RCB's Phil Salt flies back to England after injury: Will he return in IPL 2026?IPL 2026: Phil Salt has returned to England for scans on his finger injury after missing three matches for RCB. His absence has left Bengaluru reworking their top order at a crucial stage of IPL 2026.

Shedge stays grounded after Punjab Kings rescue act vs GTSuryansh Shedge struck 57 off 29 balls to lift Punjab Kings from 47 for 5 against Gujarat Titans. After the rescue act, he said his focus was on winning the trophy, not any race for places.

MI vs LSG preview: Mumbai, Lucknow fight for survival as elimination threatIPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Hardik Pandya's Mumbai Indians and Rishabh Pant's Lucknow Super Giants have their backs to the wall and will have their task cut out when they face each other on Monday at the Wankhede Stadium.

Shubman Gill continues social media banter, this time teases PBKS in Insta postIPL 2026: Shubman Gill followed Gujarat Titans' win over Punjab Kings with another teasing social media post. The post extended his pattern of post-match banter and drew fresh online reaction.

When Siraj's opening-over storm blew away PBKS top orderIPL 2026: Mohammed Siraj struck twice in the opening over to derail Punjab Kings against Gujarat Titans. The burst exposed how heavily Punjab's batting depends on a fast powerplay start.

Manchester United to hand Carrick permanent role after Champions League return?Manchester United beat Liverpool 3-2 at Old Trafford to secure Champions League qualification under caretaker boss Michael Carrick. The result has sharpened the debate over whether Carrick should get the job permanently.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
